step_rationale: Thrombo-inflammation mediator; enhances platelet–leukocyte crosstalk and ischemia-reperfusion injury.
mechanism: Sema7A bridges platelet activation and monocyte recruitment, amplifying thrombo-inflammatory responses during acute MI and reperfusion injury.

references.title: Serum Sema7A is increased in patients with acute aortic dissection.
Red blood cell-derived semaphorin 7A promotes thrombo-inflammation in myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury through platelet GPIb.
